column49: Emotional Tone With Courtesy:- RM didn’t answer to “Salam” given by subscriber.
column61: Customer complained that he got unnecessarilly charged from his bkash account and here CM requested customer to contact with bkash hotline but didn't share the bkash hotline number & charges during the call which was wrong. As per our process, if we suggest customer to contact with other hotlines such as bkash, nagad etc, the mentioned hotline number and charges must be shared as per FAQ which was missing in this call. So overall we are considering this transaction as CE.
